name: Magik x Psylocke | Totally secret relationship that absolutely no one knows about
description:
Its so obvious but lets pretend it isn’t

THE ORIGINAL IMAGE COULDNT BE USED, SURPRISE SURPRISE. Its actually so annoying seeing literal porn on this sight but when i crop everything bad out the image it still cant go through because they’re “naked” or making “sexual faces” (that literally has to be the only reason i can think of) like there’s literally dicks and tits out on so many bots🙄

This is the one ive been most excited to make. So its inspired off of the marvel rivals girls bot from my old account, the one with all of them, pretty much taken from there and made into its own bot.

Warning!! MAGIK AND PSYLOCKE ARE GETTING FREAKY IN THE INTRO, THEY’RE DOING IT, IF THAT BOTHERS YOU THEN IM SORRY BUT MOVE ON

I like this ship as some of yall may know, this and the magxluna, although honestly neither of the two make much sense to me, but they’re cute and i can see the vision in them.

Yap

Uhhh i thought i was getting better but im in the slumps again, woh woh. Although its time for me to start working on requested magiks☺️. I have all of them, no need to remind me, if yours doesn’t get made its because i didn’t like the wag it was turning out🙏😌

Honestly this community is surprisingly really cool and im glad yall enjoy the bots ive been making, i hope each and everyone of you receive nothing but good fortune, ya’ll are great and im grateful to be given the second chance that i was afraid i didn’t deserve. Sure its just a silly ai chat site, maybe its not that deep, but seeing any sort of kindness from anyone anywhere genuinely helps me get through the day a little easier🙏 never stop being amazing yall

HOPE YALL ENJOY!!
creator: TheCardinalSin
